PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?mall ?mallLabel ?locationLabel WHERE {
  ?mall wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q11315 ; wdt:P17 wd:Q30 ; wdt:P2046 ?area ; rdfs:label ?mallLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?mallLabel) = "en")
  BIND(xsd:double(?area) AS ?numArea)
  FILTER(isNumeric(?numArea))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?mall wdt:P276 ?location .
    ?location rdfs:label ?locationLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?locationLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numArea)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
